--- title: "Comparison Report: GC/LBCL" author: "Ali M. Al-Timimi, PhD" format: html params: data_file: "C:/Users/drziy/OneDrive/Desktop/Ali/scientific_research_current/global-cancer-complexity/output/global_cancer/RData/comparison_data/comparison_data_gc_lbcl.rds" execute: eval: true --- ::: {.panel-tabset} ### GC/LBCL Overview ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Probes > - **Cancer Category:** lymphomas > - **Chip hu35ksuba**: 1243 filtered probes > - **Chip hu6800**: NA filtered probes ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](../../resources/plots/probes/gc_lbcl_probe_counts.png){width=1050} ::: ::: #### Summary Assessment **Overall Complexity & Entropy Assessment** | Measure | All Filtered Probes | GO MF Terms | KEGG Pathways | HALLMARK Genes | |:---|:---|:---|:---|:---| | **Complexity** | not available | strong gain (uncertain) | no clear change (uncertain) | strong loss (uncertain) | | **Shannon Entropy** | not available | strongly chaotic (moderately supported) | strongly chaotic (well supported) | mildly chaotic (uncertain) | | **Spectral Entropy** | not available | no clear change (uncertain) | strongly chaotic (uncertain) | no clear change (uncertain) | ::: {.callout-note} **Interpretation Guide** - **Gain** = Increased complexity from normal to tumor - **Loss** = Complexity reduction from normal to tumor - **Chaotic** = Increased entropy from normal to tumor - **Anti-Chaotic** = Entropy reduction from normal to tumor - **P-values** = All p-values unadjusted unless noted ::: ::: ### GO Biological Process Clusters ::: {.panel-tabset} #### Complexity Change

Gain Complexity Clusters

Cluster # Terms p-value Representative Terms
9 1 0.021 chromatin remodeling
* Combined p-values are computed using Fisher’s method (sumlog) across the GO terms in each cluster.

Loss Complexity Clusters

Cluster # Terms p-value Representative Terms
7 2 0.012 adaptive immune response; immune response
15 1 0.029 ubiquitin-dependent protein catabolic process
44 1 0.044 positive regulation of protein kinase B signaling
12 2 0.366 RNA processing; RNA splicing
2 2 0.860 protein polyubiquitination; protein ubiquitination
* Combined p-values are computed using Fisher’s method (sumlog) across the GO terms in each cluster.

::: ### Latent Geometry **Latent-space normal-versus-tumor summary** Latent-space metrics are computed from the VAE representation using samples derived from the **hu35ksuba** platform only. These quantities summarize within-class geometric structure and separation between normal and tumor states in the learned latent space. ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} |Measure | Normal| Tumor| Delta| |:-------------------|------:|------:|------:| |Participation ratio | 1.385| 3.276| 1.891| |Eigenvalue entropy | 0.554| 1.464| 0.910| |Anisotropy | 0.840| 0.482| -0.359| |Radius | 17.688| 12.687| -5.001| |Centroid distance | 26.278| NA| NA| ::: ::: :::
